name: stellar-cross-border-payments-sdk
description: Monorepo root for the Stellar Cross-Border Payments SDK

scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli && npm run build:ui
scripts.build:full: npm run build:contracts && npm run build
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:sdk && npm run type-check:cli && npm run type-check:ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=sdk && npm run test --workspace=cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=sdk && npm run lint --workspace=cli && npm run lint --workspace=ui
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=sdk && npm run clean --workspace=cli
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:contracts
